name: Educational AI & RAG Orchestration
core_problem_solved: Clients had vast amounts of internal knowledge (PDFs, videos, courses) that were inaccessible and hard to query for real-time student or employee support.
measurable_result: Architected and deployed production-ready RAG systems that deliver accurate, semantic search results and automated Q&A, reducing manual support overhead for educators.

name: High-Performance Cloud Infrastructure
core_problem_solved: Legacy backend systems struggled with scaling and high latency when processing complex API integrations and asynchronous data pipelines.
measurable_result: Built high-performance APIs and microservices in Golang, significantly improving system reliability and response times for large-scale production environments.

name: AI-Powered EdTech SaaS (MeetLala.io)
core_problem_solved: Needed a unified platform to combine video delivery, AI interaction, and secure payment processing for a seamless student experience.
measurable_result: Delivered an end-to-end full-stack SaaS platform that successfully integrates AI-driven learning tools with production-ready payment and video workflows.

name: Crypto Signal & Sentiment Analysis Bot
core_problem_solved: Traders lacked a real-time automated system to aggregate market sentiment and technical indicators into actionable Telegram alerts.
measurable_result: Developed a low-latency AI agent that processes real-time market data and news alerts, maintaining high uptime on AWS infrastructure.
